```java
package retrofit.http;

import retrofit.client.Header;
import retrofit.client.Request;
import retrofit.converter.Converter;
import retrofit.mime.FormEncodingTypedOutput;
import retrofit.mime.MultipartTypedOutput;
import retrofit.mime.TypedOutput;
import retrofit.mime.TypedString;

import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.UnsupportedEncodingException;
import java.lang.annotation.Annotation;
import java.lang.reflect.Method;
import java.lang.reflect.Type;
import java.net.URLEncoder;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.LinkedHashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.regex.Matcher;
import java.util.regex.Pattern;

import static retrofit.http.RestMethod.ParamType;

final class RequestBuilder {
  private static final String PATH_PARAMETER_NAME = "[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*";
  private static final Pattern PATH_PARAMETER = Pattern.compile("\\{(" + PATH_PARAMETER_NAME + ")\\}");
  private static final String ENC = "UTF-8";
  private final String method;
  private final String apiUrl;
  private final String relativeUrl;
  private final List<Header> headers;
  private final String contentType;
  private final Converter converter;
  private final Annotation[] methodAnnotations;
  private final Annotation[][] parameterAnnotations;
  private final Object[] args;
  private final Method methodDetail;
  private final boolean isStreaming;

  RequestBuilder(String method, String apiUrl, String relativeUrl, List<Header> headers, String contentType,
                 Converter converter, Method methodDetail, Annotation[] methodAnnotations, Annotation[][] parameterAnnotations, Object[] args, boolean isStreaming) {
    this.method = method;
    this.apiUrl = apiUrl;
    this.relativeUrl = relativeUrl;
    this.headers = headers;
    this.contentType = contentType;
    this.converter = converter;
    this.methodAnnotations = methodAnnotations;
    this.parameterAnnotations = parameterAnnotations;
    this.args = args;
    this.methodDetail = methodDetail;
    this.isStreaming = isStreaming;
  }

  Request build() throws IllegalArgumentException, UnsupportedEncodingException {
    String url = apiUrl;
    String requestUrl = relativeUrl;
    FormEncodingTypedOutput body = null;
    MultipartTypedOutput multipartBody = null;
    String requestContentType = contentType;


    // Process the relative URL
    if (requestUrl != null) {
      Matcher matcher = PATH_PARAMETER.matcher(requestUrl);
      StringBuffer urlBuffer = new StringBuffer();
      int argumentIndex = -1;
      while (matcher.find()) {
        String name = matcher.group(1);
        argumentIndex = getParameterIndex(name,ParamType.PATH);
        if(argumentIndex == -1) {
          throw new IllegalArgumentException("URL '" + requestUrl + "' has a parameter '" + name + "' which is not a method parameter of "+ methodDetail.getName());
        }
        String value = String.valueOf(args[argumentIndex]);
        try {
          value = URLEncoder.encode(value, ENC);
        }
        catch (UnsupportedEncodingException e) {
          throw new RuntimeException("Unable to encode path parameter "+ value + " using encoding "+ ENC,e);
        }
        matcher.appendReplacement(urlBuffer,value);
      }
      matcher.appendTail(urlBuffer);
      requestUrl = urlBuffer.toString();
      url += requestUrl;

    }

    // Process the headers
    List<Header> requestHeaders = new ArrayList<Header>(headers);
    for (int i = 0; i < parameterAnnotations.length; i++) {
      Annotation[] annotations = parameterAnnotations[i];
      if(annotations != null) {
      for (Annotation annotation : annotations) {
        if (annotation instanceof Header) {
          Header header = (Header) annotation;
            requestHeaders.add(new Header(header.value(), String.valueOf(args[i])));
        }
      }
    }
    }


    for (int i = 0; i < parameterAnnotations.length; i++) {
      Annotation[] annotations = parameterAnnotations[i];
      if(annotations != null) {
        for (Annotation annotation : annotations) {
           if (annotation instanceof  EncodedQuery) {
              if(requestUrl.contains("?")) {
                requestUrl += "&" + String.valueOf(args[i]);
              } else {
                requestUrl += "?" + String.valueOf(args[i]);
              }
             url = apiUrl + requestUrl;
          }
        }
      }
    }


     for (int i = 0; i < parameterAnnotations.length; i++) {
      Annotation[] annotations = parameterAnnotations[i];
      if(annotations != null) {
      for (Annotation annotation : annotations) {
          if (annotation instanceof  Query) {
             Query query = (Query) annotation;
             if(requestUrl.contains("?")) {
               requestUrl += "&" + query.value() + "=" + String.valueOf(args[i]);
             } else {
               requestUrl += "?" + query.value() + "=" + String.valueOf(args[i]);
             }
            url = apiUrl + requestUrl;
           }
        }
      }
    }


    String[] requestFormPair = null;
    for (Annotation methodAnnotation : methodAnnotations) {
        if (methodAnnotation instanceof  FormUrlEncoded) {
            requestFormPair = getParamNames(ParamType.FORM);
        }
         if(methodAnnotation instanceof Multipart) {
             multipartBody = new MultipartTypedOutput();
        }
    }

    for (int i = 0; i < parameterAnnotations.length; i++) {
      Annotation[] annotations = parameterAnnotations[i];
      if(annotations != null) {
       for (Annotation annotation : annotations) {
          if (annotation instanceof  Part) {
               Part part = (Part) annotation;
              if(multipartBody == null){
                  throw new IllegalArgumentException("@Part parameters can only be used with @Multipart requests."+ methodDetail.getName());
              }
               String partName = part.value();
              Object value = args[i];
               if(value instanceof TypedOutput) {
                 multipartBody.addPart(partName, (TypedOutput) value);
               } else if(value != null){
                  String contentType = part.encoding();
                  if(contentType == null || contentType.length() ==0) {
                     multipartBody.addPart(partName, new TypedString(String.valueOf(value)));
                  } else {
                    multipartBody.addPart(partName,new TypedString(String.valueOf(value),contentType));
                  }
                }

           } else if(annotation instanceof Body) {
             if(args[i] instanceof TypedOutput) {
                body = null; // if body exist clear the form.
               requestContentType = null; // do not set content type
                return new Request(method, url, requestHeaders, (TypedOutput) args[i]);
              }else{
                if(converter != null) {
                  try {
                    TypedOutput typedOutput = converter.toBody(args[i], methodDetail.getGenericParameterTypes()[i]);
                    body = null; // if body exist clear the form.
                    requestContentType = null; // do not set content type
                    return new Request(method, url, requestHeaders, typedOutput);
                  } catch (Exception e) {
                    throw new IllegalArgumentException("Unable to convert "+ args[i] +" to request body for method "+ methodDetail.getName(), e);
                  }
                } else {
                  throw new IllegalArgumentException("No converter provided for method "+ methodDetail.getName()+ " and the body is not a TypedOutput. Provide a converter or use a TypedOutput for the body.");
                }

              }

            }

          }
      }
    }
    if(requestFormPair != null){
       body = new FormEncodingTypedOutput();
      for (int i = 0; i < requestFormPair.length; i++) {
          String name = requestFormPair[i];
          if (name != null) {
            body.addField(name, String.valueOf(args[i]));
          }
        }
      }

    if(multipartBody != null && multipartBody.getPartCount() > 0){
        return new Request(method, url, requestHeaders, multipartBody);
    }
      if(body != null){
        return new Request(method, url, requestHeaders, body);
      }
    return new Request(method, url, requestHeaders, null);
  }


   private int getParameterIndex(String name, ParamType type) {
     String[] params = getParamNames(type);
     if(params != null) {
      for(int i = 0; i < params.length; i++) {
        if(name.equals(params[i]))
        {
           return i;
        }
      }
     }
    return -1;
  }
  private String[] getParamNames(ParamType type) {
    String[] params = null;
     for (Annotation methodAnnotation : methodAnnotations) {
          if (methodAnnotation instanceof  RestMethod) {
            RestMethod method = (RestMethod) methodAnnotation;
            if(type == ParamType.PATH) {
              params = method.pathParamNames();
            }else if(type == ParamType.QUERY){
              params = method.queryParamNames();
            } else if(type == ParamType.FORM){
              params = method.formParamNames();
            }
          }
      }
    return params;
  }
}
```

```groovy
package filters.route

import com.netflix.zuul.ZuulFilter
import com.netflix.zuul.context.RequestContext
import org.apache.http.HttpHost
import org.apache.http.HttpResponse
import org.apache.http.client.HttpClient
import org.apache.http.client.methods.BasicHttpRequest
import org.apache.http.client.methods.HttpPost
import org.apache.http.client.methods.HttpPut
import org.apache.http.entity.InputStreamEntity
import org.apache.http.impl.client.HttpClientBuilder
import org.apache.http.message.BasicHeader
import org.slf4j.Logger
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory

import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest
import java.net.URI
import java.net.URLDecoder

class SimpleHostRoutingFilter extends ZuulFilter {
    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(SimpleHostRoutingFilter.class)

    @Override
    String filterType() {
        return "route"
    }

    @Override
    int filterOrder() {
        return 1
    }

    @Override
    boolean shouldFilter() {
        return true
    }

    @Override
    Object run() {
        RequestContext context = RequestContext.getCurrentContext()
        HttpServletRequest request = context.getRequest()

        String verb = request.getMethod().toUpperCase();
        String uri = context.get("requestURI") as String;
        log.info("request uri: " + uri)

        HttpClient httpclient = HttpClientBuilder.create().build()

        def httpHost = getHttpHost()
        def httpRequest = null
        def requestEntity = request.getInputStream()

        switch (verb) {
            case 'POST':
                httpRequest = new HttpPost(uri + getSanitizedQueryString())
                InputStreamEntity entity = new InputStreamEntity(requestEntity, request.getContentLength())
                httpRequest.setEntity(entity)
                break
            case 'PUT':
                httpRequest = new HttpPut(uri + getSanitizedQueryString())
                InputStreamEntity entity = new InputStreamEntity(requestEntity, request.getContentLength())
                httpRequest.setEntity(entity)
                break;
            default:
                httpRequest = new BasicHttpRequest(verb, uri + getSanitizedQueryString())
        }

        try {
            HttpResponse response = forwardRequest(httpclient, httpHost, httpRequest)
            context.set("zuulResponse", response)
            response.getAllHeaders().each { header ->
                context.addZuulResponseHeader(header.getName(), header.getValue())
            }

        } catch (Exception ex) {
            log.error("error during routing", ex);
        }
        return null;
    }

    HttpResponse forwardRequest(HttpClient httpclient, HttpHost httpHost, def httpRequest) {
        def headers = RequestContext.getCurrentContext().getZuulRequestHeaders()

        headers.each { headerName, headerValue ->
            if (!headerName.equalsIgnoreCase("host")) {
                httpRequest.addHeader(new BasicHeader(headerName, headerValue))
            }
        }

        return httpclient.execute(httpHost, httpRequest);
    }

    String getSanitizedQueryString() {
        String encoding = "UTF-8"
        String currentQueryString = getQueryString()
        if (currentQueryString.equals("")) {
            return ""
        }

        String decodedQueryString = URLDecoder.decode(currentQueryString, encoding)
        return new URI(null, null, null, decodedQueryString, null).toString()
    }

    String getQueryString() {
        HttpServletRequest request = RequestContext.currentContext.getRequest();
        String query = request.getQueryString()
        return (query != null) ? query : "";
    }

    HttpHost getHttpHost() {
        RequestContext context = RequestContext.getCurrentContext()
        String host = context.get("routeHost") as String;
        URI uri = new URI(host)
        return new HttpHost(uri.getHost(), uri.getPort(), uri.getScheme())
    }
}
```

```java
package com.github.pagehelper.util;

import com.github.pagehelper.Page;
import com.github.pagehelper.cache.Cache;
import com.github.pagehelper.cache.CacheFactory;
import com.github.pagehelper.dialect.*;
import com.github.pagehelper.exception.PageException;
import org.apache.ibatis.mapping.MappedStatement;
import org.apache.ibatis.mapping.SqlSource;
import org.apache.ibatis.session.RowBounds;
import org.apache.ibatis.session.Configuration;

import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Properties;

public class BaseSqlUtil {
    private static final Map<String, Class<? extends Dialect>> dialectAliasMap = new HashMap<String, Class<? extends Dialect>>();

    static {
        //注册别名
        dialectAliasMap.put("hsqldb", HsqldbDialect.class);
        dialectAliasMap.put("h2", HsqldbDialect.class);
        dialectAliasMap.put("postgresql", HsqldbDialect.class);

        dialectAliasMap.put("mysql", MySqlDialect.class);
        dialectAliasMap.put("mariadb", MySqlDialect.class);
        dialectAliasMap.put("sqlite", MySqlDialect.class);

        dialectAliasMap.put("oracle", OracleDialect.class);
        dialectAliasMap.put("oracle12", Oracle12Dialect.class);

        dialectAliasMap.put("db2", Db2Dialect.class);
        dialectAliasMap.put("informix", InformixDialect.class);

        dialectAliasMap.put("sqlserver", SqlServerDialect.class);
        dialectAliasMap.put("sqlserver2012", SqlServer2012Dialect.class);
        dialectAliasMap.put("derby", SqlServer2012Dialect.class);
    }

    //缓存count查询的ms
    private static Cache<String, MappedStatement> msCountMap;
    private static Boolean initCache = false;

    private static void initCache(Properties properties) {
        if (initCache) {
            return;
        }
        synchronized (initCache) {
            if (initCache) {
                return;
            }
            msCountMap = CacheFactory.createCache(properties.getProperty("msCountCache"), "ms", properties);
            initCache = true;
        }
    }

    public static String fromJdbcUrl(String jdbcUrl) {
        for (String dialect : dialectAliasMap.keySet()) {
            if (jdbcUrl.indexOf(":" + dialect.toLowerCase() + ":") != -1) {
                return dialect;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    public static Dialect getDialect(String jdbcUrl, String dialectAlias, Properties properties) {
        if (properties == null) {
            properties = new Properties();
        }
        initCache(properties);
        Dialect dialect = null;
        if (dialectAlias != null && dialectAlias.length() > 0) {
            Class<? extends Dialect> dialectClass = dialectAliasMap.get(dialectAlias.toLowerCase());
            if (dialectClass == null) {
                try {
                    dialectClass = (Class<? extends Dialect>) Class.forName(dialectAlias);
                } catch (ClassNotFoundException e) {
                    throw new PageException("The dialect configured by the alias[" + dialectAlias + "] is not found, please check the alias or configuration!");
                }
            }
            try {
                dialect = dialectClass.newInstance();
            } catch (Exception e) {
                throw new PageException("Error creating the dialect [" + dialectAlias + "]", e);
            }
        }
        if (dialect == null) {
             String dialectStr = fromJdbcUrl(jdbcUrl);
             if (dialectStr == null) {
                throw new PageException("The dialect of the current database could not be automatically detected, you need to configure the dialectClass parameter!");
             }
             Class<? extends Dialect> dialectClass = dialectAliasMap.get(dialectStr);
            try {
                dialect = dialectClass.newInstance();
            } catch (Exception e) {
                throw new PageException("Error creating the dialect [" + dialectStr + "]", e);
            }
        }
        dialect.setProperties(properties);
        return dialect;
    }

    public static String getCountSql(MappedStatement ms, SqlSource sqlSource, Object parameterObject, Dialect dialect) {
        String msId = ms.getId();
        if (msCountMap.containsKey(msId)) {
            return msCountMap.get(msId).getBoundSql(parameterObject).getSql();
        }
        Configuration configuration = ms.getConfiguration();
        SqlSource countSqlSource = dialect.getCountSqlSource(configuration, sqlSource, parameterObject);
        MappedStatement countMs = new MappedStatement.Builder(configuration, msId + "_COUNT", countSqlSource, ms.getSqlCommandType()).build();
        msCountMap.put(msId, countMs);
        return countMs.getBoundSql(parameterObject).getSql();
    }

    /**
     * 获取分页的参数
     *
     * @param params
     * @return
     */
    public static Page getPageFromObject(Object params) {
        Page page = null;
        if (params instanceof Page) {
            page = (Page) params;
        }
        return page;
    }


    public static void processPageParameter(MappedStatement ms, Object parameterObject, RowBounds rowBounds, Page page) {
        if (rowBounds == RowBounds.DEFAULT) {
            if (page == null) {
                page = getPageFromObject(parameterObject);
            }
        } else {
            if(page == null){
                page = new Page(rowBounds.getOffset(),rowBounds.getLimit(), false);
            }
            if (page.getStartRow() == 0) {
                page.setStartRow(rowBounds.getOffset());
            }
            if (page.getPageSize() == 0) {
                page.setPageSize(rowBounds.getLimit());
            }
        }
         if (page != null) {
             if (page.isOrderByOnly() && page.getPageSize() == 0) {
                //当只使用orderBy时，pageSize==0
                 page.setPageSize(Integer.MAX_VALUE);
             }
             //offsetAsPageNum=false的时候，由于PageNum问题，不能使用reasonable，这里会强制为false
             page.setReasonable(false);
         }
    }
    public static void clearMsCountMap(){
      if (msCountMap!=null){
        msCountMap.clear();
      }
    }
}
```

```java
package com.squareup.javawriter;

import org.junit.Test;

import static com.google.common.truth.Truth.assertThat;
import static com.squareup.javawriter.JavaWriter.stringLiteral;

public class ParameterWriterTest {
  @Test public void simpleParameter() {
    ParameterWriter parameter = new ParameterWriter("String", "parameter");
    assertThat(parameter.toString()).isEqualTo("String parameter");
  }

  @Test public void annotatedParameter() {
    ParameterWriter parameter = new ParameterWriter("String", "parameter")
        .addAnnotation(new AnnotationWriter("Nullable"));
    assertThat(parameter.toString()).isEqualTo("@Nullable String parameter");
  }

  @Test public void multipleAnnotations() {
    ParameterWriter parameter = new ParameterWriter("String", "parameter")
        .addAnnotation(new AnnotationWriter("Nullable"))
        .addAnnotation(new AnnotationWriter("NonNull"));
    assertThat(parameter.toString()).isEqualTo("@Nullable @NonNull String parameter");
  }

  @Test public void arrayParameter() {
    ParameterWriter parameter = new ParameterWriter("String[]", "parameter");
    assertThat(parameter.toString()).isEqualTo("String[] parameter");
  }

  @Test public void typeVariableParameter() {
    ParameterWriter parameter = new ParameterWriter("T", "parameter");
    assertThat(parameter.toString()).isEqualTo("T parameter");
  }

  @Test public void parameterWithDefaultValue() {
    ParameterWriter parameter = new ParameterWriter("String", "parameter")
        .defaultValue(stringLiteral("foo"));
    assertThat(parameter.toString()).isEqualTo("String parameter = \"foo\"");
  }

  @Test public void parameterWithAnnotationAndDefaultValue() {
      ParameterWriter parameter = new ParameterWriter("String", "parameter")
              .addAnnotation(new AnnotationWriter("Nullable"))
              .defaultValue(stringLiteral("foo"));
    assertThat(parameter.toString()).isEqualTo("@Nullable String parameter = \"foo\"");
  }

    @Test public void parameterWithMultipleAnnotationsAndDefaultValue() {

                .addAnnotation(new AnnotationWriter("NonNull"))

        assertThat(parameter.toString()).isEqualTo("@Nullable @NonNull String parameter = \"foo\"");
    }
}
```

-#### 特征
-- 统一JSON响应结果封装、生成工具快速生成
+### 特征&提供
+- 最佳实践的项目结构、配置文件及精简的Maven依赖
+- 统一响应结果封装及生成工具
 - 统一异常处理
 - 常用基础方法抽象封装
-- 基于通用Mapper插件、PageHelper实现单表业务零SQL
-- Model、Mapper、MapperXML、Service、Controller使用代码生成器利用模板直接生成，可根据自己的业务定制模板，摆脱重复劳动
+- 集成MyBatis、通用Mapper插件、PageHelper分页插件，实现单表业务零SQL（相关使用文档在最下面有地址)
+- 提供代码生成器根据表名生成对应的Model、Mapper、MapperXML、Service、ServiceImpl、Controller（默认提供post和rest两套Controller模板)等基础代码，代码模板可根据实际项目的需求来定制，以便渐少重复劳动（由于每个公司业务都不太一样，所以只提供了一些简单的通用方法模板，主要是提供一个思路来减少重复代码的编写，在我们公司的使用中，其实根据业务的抽象编写了大量的代码模板，下次再做类似的项目几天就完工了)
 - 另有彩蛋，待你探索

```java
package com.evernote.android.job.util;

import android.app.job.JobInfo;
import android.content.Context;
import android.os.Build;
import android.support.annotation.NonNull;

import com.evernote.android.job.JobManager;
import com.evernote.android.job.v14.JobProxy14;
import com.evernote.android.job.v21.JobProxy21;
import com.evernote.android.job.v24.JobProxy24;

/**
 * Helper class to determine which {@link com.evernote.android.job.JobProxy} is used.
 *
 * @author rwondratschek
 */
public final class JobApi {

    private JobApi() {
        // no op
    }

    @NonNull
    public static JobProxy getJobProxy(@NonNull Context context) {
        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.N) {
            return new JobProxy24(context, getJobScheduler(context));
        } else if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.LOLLIPOP) {
            return new JobProxy21(context, getJobScheduler(context));
        } else {
            return new JobProxy14(context);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Only for testing.
     */
    /*package*/ static JobScheduler getJobScheduler(@NonNull Context context) {
        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.LOLLIPOP) {
            return new JobScheduler(context.getApplicationContext().getSystemService(android.app.job.JobScheduler.class));
        } else {
            return new JobScheduler(null);
        }
    }

    public static boolean isSupported(@NonNull Context context) {
        return Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.ICE_CREAM_SANDWICH;
    }

    /**
     * @return Whether the device supports the {@link android.app.job.JobScheduler}.
     */
    public static boolean isJobSchedulerSupported(@NonNull Context context) {
        return Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.LOLLIPOP;
    }

    public static boolean isWakeLockRequired(@NonNull JobInfo jobInfo) {
        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.N) {
            return false;
        }

        int flags = jobInfo.getFlags();
        return (flags & JobInfo.FLAG_WILL_BE_WOKEN_UP) != 0;
    }

    public static boolean isTransient(@NonNull JobInfo jobInfo) {
        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.N) {
            return jobInfo.isTransient();
        } else {
            return false;
        }
    }

    public static int getJobId(@NonNull JobInfo jobInfo) {
        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.N) {
            return jobInfo.getId();
        } else {
            return jobInfo.getId();
        }
    }

    public static void setExtras(@NonNull JobInfo.Builder builder, @NonNull PersistableBundleCompat extras) {
        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.LOLLIPOP) {
            builder.setExtras(extras.getBundle());
        }
    }
}
```

```java
package org.hibernate.query.criteria.internal.expression;

import org.hibernate.dialect.Dialect;
import org.hibernate.query.criteria.internal.CriteriaBuilderImpl;
import org.hibernate.query.criteria.internal.RenderingContext;
import org.hibernate.query.criteria.internal.ValueHandlerFactory;

import javax.persistence.criteria.Expression;
import java.io.Serializable;

/**
 * Models a literal (constant) value.
 *
 * @author Steve Ebersole
 */
public class LiteralExpression<T> extends ExpressionImpl<T> implements Serializable, Expression<T> {
	private final T literal;
	private final Class<T> javaType;

	public LiteralExpression(CriteriaBuilderImpl criteriaBuilder, T literal) {
		super( criteriaBuilder );
		this.literal = literal;
		//noinspection unchecked
		this.javaType = (Class<T>) literal.getClass();
	}

	@Override
	public Class<T> getJavaType() {
		return javaType;
	}

	public T getLiteral() {
		return literal;
	}

	@Override
	public String render(RenderingContext renderingContext) {
		return renderProjection( renderingContext );
	}

	@Override
	public String render(RenderingContext renderingContext, LiteralHandlingMode literalHandlingMode) {
		return normalRender( renderingContext, literalHandlingMode );
	}

	private String normalRender(RenderingContext renderingContext, LiteralHandlingMode literalHandlingMode) {
		final Dialect dialect = renderingContext.getDialect();
		final ValueHandlerFactory.ValueHandler handler =
				ValueHandlerFactory.determineAppropriateHandler( literal.getClass() );

		if ( handler != null ) {
			if ( LiteralHandlingMode.INLINE == literalHandlingMode ) {
				return dialect.inlineLiteral( handler.render( literal ) );
			}
			else {
				return renderingContext.registerLiteralParameter( literal, handler );
			}
		}
		else {
			return dialect.inlineLiteral( literal.toString() );
		}
	}

	private String renderProjection(RenderingContext renderingContext) {
		if ( ValueHandlerFactory.isCharacter( literal ) ) {
			// In case literal is a Character, pass literal.toString() as the argument.
			return renderingContext.getDialect().inlineLiteral( literal.toString() );
		}

		// some drivers/servers do not like parameters in the select clause
		final ValueHandlerFactory.ValueHandler handler =
				ValueHandlerFactory.determineAppropriateHandler( literal.getClass() );

		if ( handler == null ) {
			return normalRender( renderingContext, LiteralHandlingMode.BIND );
		}
		else {
			return handler.render( literal );
		}
	}
}
```
<Reason>: The left version deletes the entire file, while the right version modifies the file. Since the right version introduces a fix related to character literals, we should pick the right version to keep the fix.

```java
package org.springframework.cloud.netflix.zuul.web;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;

import org.junit.Before;
import org.junit.Test;
import org.mockito.ArgumentCaptor;
import org.mockito.Mock;
import org.mockito.MockitoAnnotations;

import org.springframework.cloud.netflix.zuul.filters.Route;
import org.springframework.cloud.netflix.zuul.filters.RouteLocator;
import org.springframework.mock.web.MockHttpServletRequest;
import org.springframework.mock.web.MockServletContext;
import org.springframework.web.servlet.HandlerExecutionChain;
import org.springframework.web.servlet.HandlerInterceptor;
import org.springframework.web.servlet.handler.AbstractHandlerMapping;
import org.springframework.web.util.UrlPathHelper;

import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;
import static org.mockito.Matchers.any;
import static org.mockito.Mockito.when;

/**
 * @author Dave Syer
 */
public class ZuulHandlerMappingTests {

	@Mock
	private RouteLocator routeLocator;

	private ZuulHandlerMapping mapping;

	@Before
	public void init() {
		MockitoAnnotations.initMocks(this);
		this.mapping = new ZuulHandlerMapping(this.routeLocator);
		this.mapping.setServletContext(new MockServletContext());
	}

	@Test
	public void simplePath() throws Exception {
		when(this.routeLocator.getMatchingRoute("/foo")).thenReturn(new Route("foo",
				"/foo", "foo", "/foo", null, null, null));
		HandlerExecutionChain chain = this.mapping
				.getHandler(new MockHttpServletRequest("GET", "/foo"));
		assertThat(chain).isNotNull();
		assertThat(chain.getHandler()).isInstanceOf(ZuulController.class);
	}

	@Test
	public void pathWithWildcard() throws Exception {
		when(this.routeLocator.getMatchingRoute("/foo/bar")).thenReturn(new Route("foo",
				"/foo/**", "foo", "/foo/bar", null, null, null));
		HandlerExecutionChain chain = this.mapping
				.getHandler(new MockHttpServletRequest("GET", "/foo/bar"));
		assertThat(chain).isNotNull();
		assertThat(chain.getHandler()).isInstanceOf(ZuulController.class);
	}

	@Test
	public void pathWithMultiWildcard() throws Exception {
```

```java
private String getBehaviorSignCode(final String name, final String desc) {
    final StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(256).append(targetJavaClassName).append("#").append(name).append("(");

    final Type[] methodTypes = Type.getMethodType(desc).getArgumentTypes();
    if (methodTypes.length != 0) {
        sb.append(methodTypes[0].getClassName());
        for (int i = 1; i < methodTypes.length; i++) {
            sb.append(",").append(methodTypes[i].getClassName());
        }
    }

    return sb.append(")").toString();
}
```

```java
package com.codingapi.tx.spi.message.netty.impl;

import com.codingapi.tx.spi.message.MessageConstants;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelInitializer;
import io.netty.channel.socket.SocketChannel;
import io.netty.handler.codec.LengthFieldBasedFrameDecoder;
import io.netty.handler.codec.LengthFieldPrepender;
import io.netty.handler.codec.string.StringDecoder;
import io.netty.handler.codec.string.StringEncoder;
import io.netty.handler.timeout.IdleStateHandler;
import io.netty.util.CharsetUtil;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;

import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;

/**
 * create by lorne on 2017/11/11
 */
@Component
public class NettyRpcClientInitializer extends ChannelInitializer<SocketChannel> {


    @Autowired
    private NettyRpcClientHandler nettyRpcClientHandler;

    @Override
    protected void initChannel(SocketChannel socketChannel) throws Exception {
        socketChannel.pipeline().addLast("idleStateHandler", new IdleStateHandler(MessageConstants.SOCKET_TIMEOUT, 0, 0, TimeUnit.SECONDS));
        socketChannel.pipeline().addLast("frameDecoder", new LengthFieldBasedFrameDecoder(Integer.MAX_VALUE, 0, 4, 0, 4));
        socketChannel.pipeline().addLast("frameEncoder", new LengthFieldPrepender(4));
        socketChannel.pipeline().addLast("decoder", new StringDecoder(CharsetUtil.UTF_8));
        socketChannel.pipeline().addLast("encoder", new StringEncoder(CharsetUtil.UTF_8));
        socketChannel.pipeline().addLast("handler", nettyRpcClientHandler);
    }
}
```
<Reason>: The right version deletes the file `NettyRpcClientInitializer.java`, while the left version modifies it. Since the left version contains the actual implementation of the Netty client initializer, it's more reasonable to keep the changes from the left version rather than deleting the file, hence picking strategy 1 (pick left version).

```java
public class TransferManager {
    private static final String USER_AGENT = TransferManager.class.getName() + "/" + VersionInfoUtils.getVersion();
    private static final String DEFAULT_DELIMITER = "/";

    /**
     * There is no need for threads from timedThreadPool if there is no more running threads in current process,
     * so we need a daemon thread factory for it.
     */
    private static final ThreadFactory daemonThreadFactory = new ThreadFactory() {
        final AtomicInteger threadCount = new AtomicInteger(0);
        public Thread newThread(Runnable r) {
            int threadNumber = threadCount.incrementAndGet();
            Thread thread = new Thread(r);
            thread.setDaemon(true);
            thread.setName("S3TransferManagerTimedThread-" + threadNumber);
            return thread;
        }
    };
}
```

  private static ModuleEnvironment getEnv(Context context) {
    ModuleManager moduleManager = context.get(ModuleManager.class);
    AssetManager assetManager = context.get(AssetManager.class);
    Config config = context.get(Config.class);
    Set<Module> selectedModules = Sets.newHashSet();
    for (Name moduleName : config.getDefaultModSelection().listModules()) {
      Module module = moduleManager.getRegistry().getLatestModuleVersion(moduleName);
      if (module != null) {
        selectedModules.add(module);
        for (DependencyInfo dependencyInfo : module.getMetadata().getDependencies()) {
          selectedModules.add(moduleManager.getRegistry().getLatestModuleVersion(dependencyInfo.getId()));
        }
      }
    }
    ModuleEnvironment environment = moduleManager.loadEnvironment(selectedModules, false);
    assetManager.setEnvironment(environment);
    return environment;
  }

```java
import java.lang.annotation.*;

@Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)
@Target(ElementType.METHOD)
public @interface Unroll {
  // to ensure best possible tool support, we use the same default naming
  // scheme as JUnit's @Parameterized
  Class<? extends Closure> value() default Closure.class;
  String name() default "#featureName[#iterationCount]";
}
```
<Reason>: 
The left version changes the `value()` field to be a class type, while the right version changes the default value of `value()` to a string. Neither change is inherently better than the other, but they are both trying to configure how the unroll annotation should function. Therefore, a manual edit is needed, which includes keeping the class type change from the left version and also adding a new `name()` field with the default string value from the right version. This combines the advantages of both changes and makes the annotation more flexible by allowing users to configure both the class and the name.

NOTE: The retry filter does not currently support retrying with a body (e.g. for POST or PUT requests with a body).

NOTE: When using the retry filter with a `forward:` prefixed URL, the target endpoint should be written carefully so that in case of an error it does not do anything that could result in a response being sent to the client and committed. For example, if the target endpoint is an annotated controller, the target controller method should not return `ResponseEntity` with an error status code. Instead it should throw an `Exception`, or signal an error, e.g. via a `Mono.error(ex)` return value, which the retry filter can be configured to handle by retrying.

=== Default Filters

If you would like to add a filter and apply it to all routes you can use `spring.cloud.gateway.default-filters`.
This property takes a list of filters

=== RequestSize GatewayFilter Factory
The RequestSize GatewayFilter Factory can restrict a request from reaching the downstream service , when the request size is greater than the permissible limit. The filter takes `RequestSize` as parameter which is the permissible size limit of the request defined in bytes.
